<!-- Keep PR descriptions structured so future-you (or anyone else) can pick up the trail later. Delete sections that don't apply. -->

## Summary

_1–2 sentences: what changed and why._

## Changes

_Concrete bullet list of what this PR adds, modifies, or removes._

## Context

_Link to the plan task, spec section, ADR, or issue this implements. At minimum, link to the plan task._

- Plan: `docs/plans/...` — Task N
- Spec: `docs/specs/...` _(if applicable)_
- ADR: `docs/adr/...` _(if applicable)_

## Verification

_What you actually did to verify this works. Check the boxes you've completed._

- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Local tests: `<command>`
- [ ] Manual smoke (if applicable): `<what>`
- [ ] `cdk diff` reviewed (if infra)

## Rollback

_How to revert if needed. Default is "revert this PR." Note anything special (e.g., a deploy that can't be cleanly rolled back, a flag that needs to flip first)._

## Notes

_Anything the reviewer should know — risks, follow-ups, intentional scope choices._
